analysis.object: T673: Quantum Gravity and Holography depth analysis

adscft_duality.description: AdS/CFT: {EML-2, EML-3} two-level Langlands duality with EML-inf bulk
adscft_duality.reason: AdS/CFT is two-level duality: CFT (EML-3 oscillatory) = boundary shadow of AdS (EML-inf bulk)

black_hole_entropy.description: Bekenstein-Hawking entropy: EML-2 measurement; S = A/4 is EML-2 area measurement
black_hole_entropy.reason: BH entropy is EML-2: area measurement of EML-inf horizon; shadow depth theorem in GR

information_paradox.description: Information paradox: EML-inf information lost in black hole vs EML-3 unitarity
information_paradox.reason: Information paradox is EML-inf vs EML-3: unitary evolution (EML-3) vs black hole absorption (EML-inf)

luc_candidate.description: AdS/CFT is LUC candidate instance: boundary/bulk duality = {EML-3, EML-inf} pair
luc_candidate.reason: AdS/CFT as LUC: boundary CFT (EML-3) is the shadow; bulk AdS (EML-inf) is the referent
